list.title: Datasources
list.subtitle: Manage external datasources such as PMTiles and COG files
list.delete_description: This action cannot be undone. The datasource will be deleted, but the tileset will not.
list.bulk_delete_description: Delete the selected {count} datasource(s). This action cannot be undone. Tilesets will not be deleted.

new.title: Register new datasource
new.subtitle: Register a PMTiles or COG file
new.card_description: Enter the datasource information to link to a tileset
new.type_pmtiles_desc: PMTiles is a vector tile archive format (linked to tilesets of type "pmtiles")
new.type_cog_desc: COG is the Cloud Optimized GeoTIFF format (linked to tilesets of type "raster")
new.mode_url_desc: Specify an external HTTP(S) URL (internal URLs like s3:// are not supported)
new.mode_upload_desc: Upload a local file directly to Fly Tigris (S3-compatible storage)
new.url_desc_pmtiles: Enter the PMTiles file URL (must support HTTP Range Requests)
new.url_desc_cog: Enter the Cloud Optimized GeoTIFF file URL
new.storage_s3: S3 Compatible (Fly Tigris / AWS S3 / R2)
new.storage_auto_detect: Auto-detected from URL, but can be changed manually
new.file_desc_cog: Select a Cloud Optimized GeoTIFF file (.tif / .tiff / .geotiff extension)
new.help_pmtiles_desc: PMTiles is a format that archives vector tiles into a single file. It efficiently retrieves tiles using HTTP Range Requests.
new.help_cog_desc: Cloud Optimized GeoTIFF (COG) is a GeoTIFF format optimized for efficient cloud access. Partial reads are possible, allowing only the necessary parts of large images to be retrieved.
new.help_storage_s3: S3 Compatible - Fly Tigris / AWS S3 / Cloudflare R2, etc. (authenticated with API key)
new.help_storage_http: HTTP - General HTTP server (CORS and Range Requests required)
new.help_upload_desc: Choosing "Upload file" saves directly to Fly Tigris's private bucket and is managed as an internal URL (s3://). Since tile delivery is done through the API, external access to the bucket is not possible, providing a secure configuration.
new.error_api_not_ready: API is not ready. Please wait a moment.
new.error_no_file: Please select a file to upload.

detail.subtitle: Datasource detail
detail.test_success: Connection successful. The datasource is accessible.
detail.url_internal_note: Cannot be opened directly in a browser because it is an internal URL ({type}). Tile delivery is done through the API.
detail.delete_description: This action cannot be undone. The datasource will be deleted, but the tileset will not.
